---
id: get-customer-info
title: "Get customer info"
description: "Returns customer information including premises and devices (things). Use this endpoint as your starting point after login."
sidebar_label: "Get customer info"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api:

info_path: docs/api/usage-api/energygrid-usage-api

---

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Get customer info"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/Customer/userinfo"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Returns customer information including premises and devices (things). Use this endpoint as your starting point after login.

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={undefined}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={undefined}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
  responses={{"200":{"description":"Success. Returns customer object with premises and things.","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","properties":{"customerId":{"type":"integer","description":"EnergyGrid's internal customer ID","example":699493},"clientId":{"type":"string","description":"Utility's BPN, billing ID, profile, or client ID","example":"1102135077"},"sites":{"type":"array","description":"List of customer sites (premises)","items":{"type":"object","properties":{"customerSiteId":{"type":"integer","description":"EnergyGrid's internal site ID","example":799644},"externalSiteId":{"type":"string","description":"Utility's premise, site, or service point location identifier","example":"5111586293"},"billingId":{"type":"string","description":"Billing ID associated with the premise","example":"B123456"},"things":{"type":"array","description":"Array of devices and meters at this site","items":{"type":"object","properties":{"type":{"type":"string","description":"Thing type","example":"electric ami (1 day)"},"category":{"type":"string","description":"Thing category","example":"Whole Home Meter"},"minimumGranularityType":{"type":"string","description":"Minimum granularity type the thing supports","example":"hour"},"externalDeviceId":{"type":"string","description":"Utility's meter number or service point number","example":"5723840"},"fuel":{"type":"string","description":"Fuel type: electric or gas","example":"electric"},"name":{"type":"string","description":"Thing name assigned by EnergyGrid","example":"Electric Meter Ami"},"powerCoreId":{"type":"integer","description":"EnergyGrid's device or service point ID","example":2303158},"isUsageLoaded":{"type":"boolean","description":"Indicates if usage data is loaded","example":true},"minimumGranularityTypeId":{"type":"integer","example":4},"thingTypeId":{"type":"integer","example":13},"thingCategoryId":{"type":"integer","example":5},"billingCycleId":{"type":"integer","example":1},"usageSummary":{"type":"object","properties":{"min":{"type":"number","description":"Minimum usage value","example":0},"max":{"type":"number","description":"Maximum usage value","example":10},"avg":{"type":"number","description":"Average usage value","example":5},"sum":{"type":"number","description":"Total usage sum","example":15}},"title":"UsageSummary"},"usage":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","properties":{"totalUnit":{"type":"number","description":"Total energy units consumed","example":15},"timeStamp":{"type":"string","format":"date-time","description":"Usage data timestamp (ISO 8601)","example":"2024-05-01T00:00:00"},"cost":{"type":"number","description":"Cost for this usage period","example":1},"costContainers":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","properties":{"totalUnit":{"type":"number","description":"Energy units for this rate group","example":15},"cost":{"type":"number","description":"Cost for this rate group","example":1},"intervalTypeId":{"type":"integer","example":1},"rateGroupingId":{"type":"integer","description":"Rate grouping ID","example":2},"calculatorRateId":{"type":"integer","nullable":true}},"title":"CostContainer"}}},"title":"UsageDataPoint"}},"forecast":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","properties":{"totalUnit":{"type":"number","description":"Total energy units consumed","example":15},"timeStamp":{"type":"string","format":"date-time","description":"Usage data timestamp (ISO 8601)","example":"2024-05-01T00:00:00"},"cost":{"type":"number","description":"Cost for this usage period","example":1},"costContainers":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","properties":{"totalUnit":{"type":"number","description":"Energy units for this rate group","example":15},"cost":{"type":"number","description":"Cost for this rate group","example":1},"intervalTypeId":{"type":"integer","example":1},"rateGroupingId":{"type":"integer","description":"Rate grouping ID","example":2},"calculatorRateId":{"type":"integer","nullable":true}},"title":"CostContainer"}}},"title":"UsageDataPoint"}},"properties":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"object"}}},"title":"Thing"}}},"title":"Site"}}},"title":"CustomerInfo"}}}},"400":{"description":"Bad request."},"401":{"description":"Unauthorized. Invalid or missing authentication token."},"404":{"description":"Not found. Customer doesn't exist."}}}
>
  
</StatusCodes>
